title: hieracium sagittatum subsp. submoeanum
intro: Hieracium sagittatum subsp. submoeanum, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium sagittatum subsp. submoeanum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
